name: Virtual Tee Systems
address: 650 N State St, Lake Oswego, OR 97034
about: Virtual Tee Systems specializes in custom golf simulator installations for residential and commercial clients. They provide luxury golf simulator experiences by planning every aspect of a project, from space selection to equipment integration. The company is headquartered in Denver with locations across the lower 48 states, offering prompt and reliable service for custom-built golf simulators and launch monitors.
why_golfers_like_it: Custom-built luxury golf simulators tailored to individual spaces
Premium launch monitors including Trackman, Uneekor, and Foresight
Nationwide service coverage across the lower 48 states

food_and_drink.notes: On-site bars and food service available, with images showing basement home bars and multiple bay bars
Full bar service available with dedicated golf simulator bar areas

simulator_hardware.notes: Premium launch monitor option for professional-grade tracking
High-performance launch monitor system for accurate ball and club tracking

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: While you can bring your own clubs, Virtual Tee provides custom-fit solutions and can assist with club selection as part of their comprehensive simulator installation services.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No, Virtual Tee provides on-site food and bar services with dedicated simulator bars and full kitchen facilities available at their locations.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: 18 holes typically takes 2-3 hours depending on the simulator setup and number of players, though exact timing may vary based on the specific configuration.

faq.question: Is this venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Virtual Tee is family-friendly and suitable for junior golfers, offering custom simulator installations that can accommodate family use and youth golf practice.
